content: For server-to-client-only notification delivery (no client-to-server streaming needed), 2025/2026 guidance favors SSE over WebSocket: SSE runs over plain HTTP (works through existing proxies/load balancers/CDNs without special config), auto-reconnects natively, and is simpler to operate; WebSocket is reserved for bidirectional needs. Production SSE at scale requires Redis pub/sub to fan out across multiple app instances.
